title: Bump github.com/containers/common from 0.38.4 to 0.39.0
body:
Bumps [github.com/containers/common](https://github.com/containers/common) from 0.38.4 to 0.39.0.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/containers/common's releases.

v0.39.0

Vendor in containers/storage v1.32.0
Ensure configuration directory is created for networks
Include gateway in generated default networks
Use Private as default for rootless when we want CNI
rootless networking
libimage: add some comments
libimage: add more image tests
build(deps): bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.31.1 to 1.32.0
rootless_networking = "slirp4netns | cni"
build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/runc from 1.0.0-rc94 to 1.0.0-rc95
Commits
  • ea9b715 Bump to v0.39.0
  • 5811566 Merge pull request #577 from rhatdan/VENDOR
  • bcb7bc9 Vendor in containers/storage v1.32.0
  • f9e1946 Merge pull request #576 from mheon/mkdir_config_dir
  • 50eb1bf Ensure configuration directory is created for networks
  • 3b5a98d Merge pull request #575 from Luap99/cni-gateway
  • 18ea4c2 Include gateway in generated default networks
  • b81fcbc Merge pull request #571 from vrothberg/libimage-comments
  • 8403340 Merge pull request #574 from mheon/no_gw
  • 2452ceb Do not include gateway in generated default networks
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view
